authors: Florence Le Cam Manon Libert Bart Vanhaelewyn Sarah Van Leuven a Université libre de Bruxelles
raw_title: Nowhere to Feel Safe Anymore Mapping Public and Organisational Violence Against Journalists in Belgium
title_en: Nowhere to Feel Safe Anymore Mapping Public and Organisational Violence Against Journalists in Belgium
title_zh: 无处安身：比利时记者遭受公众与组织暴力情况调查
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究调查了比利时记者在工作中遭受暴力的状况，包括来自公众和组织的暴力行为。研究旨在了解记者面临的安全威胁，并绘制暴力事件的地图分布。
plain_summary_en: This research investigates the violence experienced by journalists in Belgium, including violence from the public and organizations. The study aims to understand the safety threats journalists face and map the distribution of violent incidents.
research_direction_zh: 新闻业安全与记者保护研究，关注暴力威胁对新闻自由和记者工作的影响。
research_direction_en: Journalism safety and journalist protection research, focusing on the impact of violent threats on press freedom and journalistic work.
